headline: Will SpaceX's blockbuster IPO soar or sputter? Past IPOs offer clues.

headline: Nasdaq Drops in Market Rotation. Small Caps Are Faring Better.
summary: A sideways selloff continued in early afternoon trading on Wednesday, but small-caps were holding their ground. The Nasdaq Composite was down 1.6% after falling about 1.7% at its low. The index was up 0.

headline: Truist reshuffles fintech picks, downgrades BILL and upgrades Global-e
summary: Investing.com -- Truist Securities downgraded fintech software company BILL Holdings to Hold from Buy while upgrading cross-border e-commerce platform Global-e Online to Buy, arguing that investors should reposition within the fintech sector as competitive and growth dynamics shift.

headline: A Look At Truist Financial (TFC) Valuation As New CRE Master Servicing Platform Gains Rating Support
summary: Truist Financial (TFC) recently moved to expand its commercial real estate footprint, as subsidiary Grandbridge Real Estate Capital launched a Master Servicing platform that has already received ratings from all major rating agencies. See our latest analysis for Truist Financial. The share price has picked up recently, with an 8.28% 90 day share price return and a 26.86% total shareholder return over the past year, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 78.01% points to stronger longer...
